name: Liberty Pawn & The Jewelry Buyers
description_short: Liberty Pawn & The Jewelry Buyers is a 20+ year established pawn shop in the Phoenix East Valley area selling new and used merchandise including jewelry, collectibles, and general goods.
description_long:
Liberty Pawn & The Jewelry Buyers has operated continuously since 2000 as a locally-owned pawn shop serving the Phoenix East Valley region, including Mesa, Tempe, and surrounding areas. The business has maintained the same original owner throughout its 20+ year history, indicating stability and continuity in operations and business practices.

The company operates primarily through eBay as an online sales channel, selling a diverse inventory of new and used items. Based on their eBay storefront categories, they deal in jewelry, collectibles, electronics, musical instruments, sporting goods, antiques, and general merchandise. Their product range spans from jewelry and watches to vintage items, vintage electronics, and other second-hand goods typical of pawn shop inventory.

What distinguishes Liberty Pawn & The Jewelry Buyers is their extended tenure in the local market and their transition to significant eBay sales operations. With 1,934 positive feedback ratings on eBay and a 100% positive feedback score, they have demonstrated reliability and customer satisfaction in the online marketplace. They maintain an established eBay seller presence with over 26 followers, indicating buyer trust and repeat customer interest.

The company functions primarily as a reseller of second-hand and collectible goods rather than as an active pawn lending operation based on available information. Their eBay presence shows them as established sellers with strong transaction history, though specific details about in-store pawn lending services, loan terms, interest rates, or collateral-based lending practices are not documented in the website content provided.
pros: 20+ years of continuous operation with original owner management
100% positive feedback rating on eBay with 1,934 positive reviews
Established local presence serving East Valley (Mesa, Tempe, Phoenix area)
Diverse inventory of new and used merchandise across multiple categories
Fast payment reputation as a buyer on eBay per seller feedback
Large selection of jewelry, collectibles, electronics, and instruments
cons: Limited information available about in-store pawn lending services, loan terms, or APR rates
Minimal recent activity with only 1 feedback in the last 12 months, suggesting reduced current sales volume
No dedicated website beyond eBay storefront; limited independent online presence
Unclear whether they actively offer collateral-based loans or function primarily as resellers
best_for: Sellers looking to liquidate jewelry, collectibles, or used merchandise through eBay
Buyers seeking vintage, collectible, or second-hand items from a reputable seller
Local customers in Phoenix, Mesa, and Tempe area with items to sell or pawn
diagnosis: Liberty Pawn & The Jewelry Buyers is best for local East Valley customers seeking to buy or sell jewelry and used merchandise, or eBay buyers interested in collectibles and vintage items from a long-established seller. The main caveat is that specific information about pawn lending services, loan terms, collateral requirements, and fees is not available through their public eBay presence—customers needing traditional pawn loans should contact them directly to confirm services offered.
